books.title: RightStart Mathematics Level G 2nd Ed. Book Bundle
books.rationale:
RightStart is based on discovery, using a wide range of manipulatives. It is an up-to-date, spiraling program that uses methods that are heavily supported by current research. 
➜  Students new to Right Start will also need the G2S Math Set. Those who have the RS2 Math Set will need to order the G2S Set Short.
books.noteText:
Choose this or Denison. The "Free" link will take you to a YouTube playlist where a master teacher will walk you through how these lessons are structured and how to teach them.  Online class or Independent Video Class also available: https://store.rightstartmath.com/rightstart-mathematics-level-g-online-class/
➜ eWorkbooks are available for multiple students.
